thesis: Leading provider of daily satellite imagery and geospatial data, operating the largest commercial Earth observation constellation with ~200 satellites. FY2026 revenue of $307.7M (+26% YoY) with first year of positive free cash flow ($57.7M). $900M backlog (+79% YoY) provides strong visibility. However, stock trades at extreme 40x P/S valuation after 900%+ run-up, leaving limited margin of safety. Market leader position but priced for near-flawless execution.

drivers: Platform adoption drives recurring revenue to 85%+

risks: Operating expenses grow faster than revenue

base_case.assumptions: Revenue grows at 35% CAGR through 2030; Gross margins stabilize at 58-60%; Operating margins reach 20% by 2030; Market share remains strong but faces competition; Free cash flow generation continues.

catalysts.event: New Contract Announcements — Government and commercial

key_risks: Extreme valuation at 40x P/S prices in perfection
900%+ run-up in past year creates significant downside risk
Short interest at 12.3% of float creates volatility
Competition from Maxar, BlackSky, and new entrants
